payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT cm.Id, cm.FullName, COUNT(cn.Model) AS ModelCount FROM car_makers cm LEFT JOIN car_names cn ON cm.Id = cn.MakeId GROUP BY cm.Id, cm.FullName'}

inputs.sql: SELECT cm.Id, cm.FullName, COUNT(cn.Model) AS ModelCount FROM car_makers cm LEFT JOIN car_names cn ON cm.Id = cn.MakeId GROUP BY cm.Id, cm.FullName
